articles.title: Here’s the latest on Red Sox Triston Casas, Johan Oviedo’s injuries
articles.description:
Casas’s rib injury doesn’t appear to be a long-term issue.

The post Here’s the latest on Red Sox Triston Casas, Johan Oviedo’s injuries appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Triston Casas's rib injury is not expected to be long-term.
Johan Oviedo's injury status remains unclear as of April 4, 2026.
Casas's quick recovery could bolster the Red Sox's lineup for upcoming games.
